# INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.failureRestrictedContent

**Case**

The app cannot play the media because of content restrictions.

## Declaration

```swift
case failureRestrictedContent
```

## Discussion

Respond with this code when you cannot handle the request because of a geographic region restriction or similar constraint.

## Failures

- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.failure**: A failure occurred while confirming or handling the intent.
- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.failureNoUnplayedContent**: The media container has no unplayed content.
- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.failureRequiringAppLaunch**: The user must launch the app before media playback can begin.
- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.failureUnknownMediaType**: The app cannot play the media because the type is unknown or not supported.
